description_long: This lounge set consists of four seating units arranged around a central rectangular wooden coffee table. The seating includes a three-seater sofa, two two-seater sofas, and a single armchair, all upholstered in a deep navy blue fabric with a subtle woven texture. Each seat features straight, boxy armrests and backrests, with light-colored accent cushions providing contrast and comfort. The legs of the seating units are short, wooden, and slightly tapered, giving a modern yet sturdy appearance. The coffee table is made of wood with a smooth, natural finish and a simple, blocky design. The overall ensemble is visually cohesive and designed for communal relaxation in urban outdoor or indoor settings.
description: A modern navy blue lounge set with a wooden coffee table, featuring boxy sofas and armchair with light accent cushions and short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three-seater sofa at the back, two two-seater sofas on the sides, a single armchair in front, and the central wooden coffee table.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the single armchair, with the coffee table and the arrangement of the sofas visible behind it.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing the three-seater sofa at the back and the symmetrical arrangement of the other seats and table.
description_view_3: Rear view of the single armchair, with the coffee table and the rest of the lounge set visible in the background.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each seat has a single seat cushion and one or two loose, light-colored accent cushions; the three-seater and two-seaters have back cushions, while the armchair has one back and one accent cushion.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrests with a flat top and no visible tufting or segmentation; simple and modern in style.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; armrests are straight, boxy, and at the same height as the backrest, with a padded appearance.
attribute_leg_style: Short, straight, wooden legs with a slightly tapered profile; legs are positioned at the corners and are minimally decorative.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid navy blue fabric with a subtle woven texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
